headline: Assessing Vulcan Materials (VMC) Valuation After Recent Share Price Weakness
summary: Vulcan Materials stock snapshot Vulcan Materials (VMC) has been on many investors’ radars after a recent period of weaker short term returns, with the share price down 4.3% over the past day and 10.2% over the past week. See our latest analysis for Vulcan Materials. That short term weakness follows a 30 day share price return of 15.05% decline and a 90 day share price return of 5.51% decline.
